steps.title: Spot the setting contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts where most Erdrich novels are set—everyday life in Ojibwe communities—with where The Antelope Woman is set: outside Ojibwe communities, in an urban Indigenous community in Minneapolis.

steps.title: Apply the setting contrast to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly identifies the difference: The Antelope Woman isn't set in a rural Ojibwe community like her typical work. The other choices either introduce unsupported information (C and D) or don't describe a difference from her typical work (A). That matches choice B — B is correct.
